core_principles: Neo-Brutalist Contrast: Soft pastel card backgrounds grounded by sharp, hard dark borders and solid drop shadows to prevent the UI from feeling childish.
Vibrant & Optimistic: Use clear, distinct pastel colors for different career paths (Job, Higher Ed, Startup, Business) to create instant visual recognition.
Tactile Interactions: Cards must feel pressable. When pressed, the solid shadow should disappear and the card translates down to mimic a physical button press.
Bold Typography: Expressive, tightly tracked headings combined with highly readable geometric body text.
design_philosophy.target_audience: Gen-Z Students, Mentors, and College Admins

layout.safe_area_handling: Use react-native-safe-area-context. Add appropriate top padding for headers and bottom padding for the tab bar.

motion_and_interactions.button_press: Use react-native-reanimated. On press in: scale down to 0.95, reduce shadow offset to 0px. On press out: restore.
motion_and_interactions.screen_transitions: Slide from right for deeper navigation, fade for tab switches.
motion_and_interactions.staggered_lists: List items in feeds (jobs, courses) should enter with a slight fade and slide-up animation (staggered by 50ms).

splash_background.description: A vibrant university building representing the college experience.

career_path_startup.description: Macbook and notebooks on a desk, representing startup and business paths.

career_path_education.description: Student typing on a laptop, representing higher education.

mentor_placeholder.description: Man sitting on a white bench, used as mentor profile placeholder.

student_deals_hero.description: Two young women walking past a historic university building on a sunny day.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST use `testID` attribute in React Native (e.g., `testID="login-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS via NativeWind for styling, or strict React Native StyleSheet mapping to these exact values.
Always wrap screens in SafeAreaView from react-native-safe-area-context.

Implement the custom Neo-Brutalist shadow carefully in React Native using standard shadow props on iOS and elevation on Android, or ideally, a wrapper View with an absolute positioned background View offset by 4px for a true hard shadow.
Do NOT use transparent navigation headers. Ensure headers have a solid background color matching the theme.
For the AI Chatbot interface, use the primary Accent Mint or Blue for user bubbles, and Surface color for AI bubbles, both with the 2px black border.
Never use generic placeholder images like via.placeholder.com. Use the Unsplash/Pexels URLs provided in this file.
Use react-native-reanimated for the button press scale down effects.
Ensure input fields have a focus state by changing the border color to Accent Blue or Yellow when focused.
